use std::sync::Mutex;
use std::cell::RefCell;

// BAD: public struct exposing interior mutability fields
pub struct SharedState {
    pub cache: Mutex<HashMap<String, String>>,
    pub counters: RefCell<Vec<u64>>,
    pub flags: std::cell::Cell<u32>,
}

impl SharedState {
    pub fn new() -> Self {
        Self {
            cache: Mutex::new(HashMap::new()),
            counters: RefCell::new(Vec::new()),
            flags: std::cell::Cell::new(0),
        }
    }
}

pub struct ConnectionPool {
    pub connections: Mutex<Vec<Connection>>,
    pub active: std::sync::atomic::AtomicUsize,
}
